rationale: SCOUT blocked 68.4% of actions with only 0.0% overridden. Most frequent action: 'check_action'. Consider relaxing constraints for 'check_action'.
rejection_reason: Proposal generated from acceptance test data, not production usage. Relaxing SCOUT constraints based on test traffic would be a governance regression. REJECT.
